debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_3
β : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mβ : MeasurableSpace β
inst✝² : Nonempty β
inst✝¹ : StandardBorelSpace β
κ : Kernel α β
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel κ
⊢ ∃ f, Measurable (Function.uncurry f) ∧ ∀ (a : α), Measure.map (f a) volume = κ a

failed_attempts:
Kernel.exists_map_volume_eq κ

end Aux

end ArrayModel

by
  obtain ⟨ψ, hψ⟩ := exists_measurableEmbedding_real β
  let κ' := κ.map ψ
  have : IsMarkovKernel κ' := Kernel.isMarkovKernel_map _ hψ.measurable
  obtain ⟨g, hg_meas, hg_map⟩ := Kernel.exists_map_volume_eq κ'
  let e := MeasurableEquiv.ofInjective ψ hψ.injective hψ.measurableSet_range
  let ψinv (y : ℝ) : β := if h : y ∈ Set.range ψ then e.symm ⟨y, h⟩ else Classical.choice ‹_›
  have hψinv_meas : Measurable ψinv := by
    refine Measurable.dite hψ.measurableSet_range ?_ measurable_const
    exact e.symm.measurable.comp measurable_subtype_mk
  let F (a : α) (x : I) : β := ψinv (g a x)
  have hF_meas : Measurable (Function.uncurry F) := hψinv_meas.comp hg_meas
  refine ⟨F, hF_meas, fun a ↦ ?_⟩
  rw [← hg_map, Measure.map_map hψinv_meas (hg_meas.comp measurable_prod_mk_left)]
  refine Measure.map_congr_ae ?_
  have h_range : ∀ᵐ x ∂volume, g a x ∈ Set.range ψ := by
    rw [Filter.eventually_iff, ← Measure.map_apply (hg_meas.comp measurable_prod_mk_left) hψ.measurableSet_range.compl, hg_map]
    rw [Kernel.map_apply _ hψ.measurable, Measure.map_apply hψ.measurable hψ.measurableSet_range.compl]
    simp [hψ.injective]
  filter_upwards [h_range] with x hx
  simp [F, ψinv, hx, e.left_inv]

end Aux

by
  haveI := StandardBorelSpace.isCountablyGenerated β
  haveI := StandardBorelSpace.measurableSingletonClass β
  exact Kernel.exists_map_unitInterval_eq κ

end Aux

end ArrayModel
